DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: DEFENDANT BT CALIFORNIA LLC DBA VANITY NIGHTCLUB'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Off calendar. The moving party has failed to show that the parties met and conferred "in person, by telephone, or by video conference" in compliance with CCP 430.41. The parties are ordered to comply with the code. The response to the amended complaint is now due by June 25, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Deputy: Not Present. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: DEFENDANT BT CALIFORNIA LLC DBA VANITY NIGHTCLUB'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Off calendar. The moving party has failed to show that the parties met and conferred "in person, by telephone, or by video conference" in compliance with CCP 435.5. The parties are ordered to comply with the code. The response to the amended complaint is now due by June 25, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Deputy: Not Present. (302/RBU)
